column1: # sheet.fn.logical.switch golden corpus (spec §7, §11; Microsoft SWITCH docs).
# expression against each valueN by the cross-type total order coerce::compare
# (the same equality lookup uses) and returns the first matching resultN.
# Rulings: a lone trailing argument after the pairs is the default; no match and
# no default -> #N/A; an error in the expression propagates; text matches
# case-insensitively (the compare fold); a number never matches numeric text.
# Args use ';' as the separator (the family decoder splits on ';').
